transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling Meridian Health Line, this is your virtual assistant. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need a refill on my blood pressure medication. It's lisinopril, ten milligrams.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, I can help with that. Can I get your full name and date of birth to pull up your record?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Yes, it's Carol Denning, born March 4th, 1967.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Carol. I see your lisinopril prescription with Dr. Okafor, last filled about a month ago at Fairview Pharmacy. Is that the correct one?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great. I'll send the refill request to Fairview Pharmacy now. You should get a text when it's ready, usually within a couple hours.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome. Anything else I can help you with today?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, take care, Carol. Have a good rest of your day.
